title: Fast rotations in galaxies at cosmic noon indicate central concentration of stars, dark matter or massive black holes
summary: The rotation curves of regularly rotating disc galaxies are a unique probe of the gravitational potential and dark matter distribution. Until recently, matter decomposition of rotation curves at $z>0.5$ was challenging, not only due to the lack of high resolution kinematic data but also of both suitable photometry to accurately trace the stellar surface density and spatially-resolved sub-mm observations to trace the cold gas distribution. In this paper, we analyse three galaxies from the Archival Large Program to Advance Kinematic Analysis (ALPAKA) sample, combining highly resolved cold gas observations from ALMA with rest-frame near-infrared imaging from JWST to investigate their dynamical properties and constrain their dark matter halos. The galaxies, initially classified as regularly rotating discs based on ALMA observations alone, appear in JWST as extended and symmetric stellar discs with spiral arms. Our dynamical models reproduce the rotation of the discs in the outer parts well, but they systematically underpredict the inner rotation velocities, revealing a deficit of central mass relative to the data. This discrepancy indicates either an underestimation of the bulge masses due to variations in the stellar mass-to-light ratio or dust attenuation or the presence of overmassive black holes. Alternatively, it may suggest departures from standard dark-matter halo profiles, including enhanced central concentrations.

AI.tldr: 该研究结合ALMA和JWST观测数据，分析三个高红移盘状星系的旋转曲线，发现动力学模型在星系中心区域低估了旋转速度，表明存在中心质量缺失或暗物质分布异常。
AI.motivation: 高红移星系（z>0.5）的旋转曲线分析一直面临挑战，缺乏高分辨率运动学数据、准确追踪恒星表面密度的测光数据以及空间分辨的亚毫米观测来追踪冷气体分布。本研究旨在利用ALMA和JWST的先进观测能力，研究高红移盘状星系的动力学特性并约束其暗物质晕。
AI.method: 从ALPAKA样本中选取三个星系，结合ALMA的高分辨率冷气体观测和JWST的静止近红外成像数据。这些星系最初仅基于ALMA观测被分类为规则旋转盘。通过构建动力学模型来模拟星系的旋转曲线，并与观测数据进行比较。
AI.result: JWST观测显示这些星系是延伸的对称恒星盘，带有旋臂结构。动力学模型能够很好地再现星系外围区域的旋转，但系统性地低估了中心区域的旋转速度，揭示了相对于观测数据的中心质量缺失。
AI.conclusion: 观测与模型之间的差异表明：1）由于恒星质量-光比变化或尘埃消光导致核球质量被低估；2）存在超大质量黑洞；3）偏离标准暗物质晕分布，包括增强的中心浓度。这些发现对高红移星系的暗物质分布和中心质量构成提出了重要问题。

recommendation.reason: 该论文直接研究高红移（cosmic noon）盘状星系的旋转曲线，结合ALMA冷气体和JWST近红外成像数据，探讨暗物质分布和中心质量缺失问题。这与用户画像中的dark matter、jwst、alma、cosmic noon、dust、halo、rotation curves等核心关键词高度匹配，且研究主题（高红移星系动力学、暗物质晕约束）与用户主要兴趣领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学）紧密相关。论文方法（动力学建模）和科学问题（中心质量缺失、暗物质分布）均与用户兴趣一致。无负面关键词匹配。
recommendation.topic_fit: 极高。论文主题（高红移星系旋转曲线、暗物质分布）与用户画像中的dark matter、jwst、alma、cosmic noon、dust、halo等关键词高度吻合，且属于用户优先关注的高红移星系动力学领域。
recommendation.method_fit: 高。论文采用ALMA冷气体运动学数据和JWST近红外成像，结合动力学模型拟合旋转曲线，这与用户画像中频繁出现的ALMA、JWST以及动力学建模方法一致。
recommendation.author_fit: 中等。作者名单中包括Francesca Rizzo，该名字与用户核心作者列表中的'f rizzo'（权重5.5）匹配，表明存在一定的作者关联。其他作者未在用户核心作者中出现。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 高。论文首次结合ALMA和JWST数据对高红移星系进行详细的旋转曲线分解，发现中心质量缺失，并讨论了暗物质晕轮廓偏离标准模型的可能，具有较高的新颖性。
recommendation.negative_reason: 无。论文未涉及用户明确排除的领域（如恒星物理、纯宇宙学、粒子物理、中微子物理、太阳系研究）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 规则旋转盘星系的旋转曲线是研究引力势和暗物质分布的独特探针。直到最近，对红移$z>0.5$的星系进行物质分解仍然具有挑战性，这不仅是因为缺乏高分辨率的运动学数据，还因为缺乏能够精确追踪恒星面密度的合适测光数据以及能够追踪冷气体分布的空间分辨亚毫米观测数据。本文分析了来自档案大型运动学分析计划（ALPAKA）样本的三个星系，结合ALMA的高分辨率冷气体观测数据和JWST的静止系近红外成像数据，研究它们的动力学性质并约束其暗物质晕。这些星系最初仅基于ALMA观测被分类为规则旋转盘，在JWST图像中表现为具有旋臂的延展且对称的恒星盘。我们的动力学模型很好地再现了星系外部的旋转，但系统性地低估了内部旋转速度，揭示了相对于数据而言中心质量的不足。这种差异表明，要么是由于恒星质量-光比变化或尘埃消光导致核球质量被低估，要么是存在超大质量黑洞。或者，它可能暗示偏离了标准暗物质晕轮廓，包括增强的中心浓度。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，观测与模型之间的差异表明：1）由于恒星质量-光比变化或尘埃消光导致核球质量被低估；2）存在超大质量黑洞；3）偏离标准暗物质晕分布，包括增强的中心浓度。这些发现对高红移星系的暗物质分布和中心质量构成提出了重要问题。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Main properties and data of the three ALPAKA discs studied in this paper. The galaxies were selected based on their kinematic properties, spatial resolution and availability of ancillary JWST data, as explained in the main text. Columns: (i) ALPAKA ID number. (ii) Redshift of the galaxy. (iii) Emission line used for the kinematics. (iv) Corresponding emission-line luminosity. (v) Number of independent resolution elements over the major axis of the ALMA data, defined as the diameter of the gas disc divided by the circularised ALMA beam. (vi) and (vii) JWST imaging filter used for tracing the distribution of the stellar continuum and the corresponding rest-frame pivot wavelength. (viii) and (ix) Stellar mass and star formation rate, respectively (see Rizzo et al. , 2023 , for details) .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本文研究的三个ALPAKA盘的主要性质和数据。这些星系是根据其运动学性质、空间分辨率以及辅助JWST数据的可用性选择的，详见正文。列：(i) ALPAKA编号。(ii) 星系红移。(iii) 用于运动学的发射线。(iv) 相应的发射线光度。(v) ALMA数据长轴上的独立分辨率元数量，定义为气体盘直径除以圆化后的ALMA波束。(vi) 和 (vii) 用于追踪恒星连续谱分布的JWST成像滤光片及其相应的静止系中心波长。(viii) 和 (ix) 恒星质量和恒星形成率（详见Rizzo等人，2023）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Top row: ALPAKA subsample of galaxies analysed in this work. The galaxies are organised in ascending order of redshift, from left to right. The gas data (see Table 1 ) are shown as blue contours with levels following \(3\sigma\) , \(6\sigma\) and \(12\sigma\) , where \(\sigma\) is the root-mean-square (RMS) noise of the ALMA moment 0th map of the gas emission. We also show negative emission with dashed contours at the \(-3\sigma\) level and the corresponding ALMA beam on the bottom left of each panel. In the background, we display the JWST filter used for deriving the stellar surface brightness, same as the one reported in Table 1 . The ALMA contours shown here are simply the emission levels on the unmasked 0th-moment maps, therefore they differ from the pseudo-X \(\sigma\) contours shown in Rizzo et al. ( 2023 ) . Bottom row: RGB composite JWST images. We note that the scales in the top and bottom rows are different with a larger FOV on the bottom panels that allow us to see the foreground and background galaxies surrounding ID3 and ID13.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：上行：本文分析的ALPAKA子样本星系。星系按红移升序从左到右排列。气体数据（见表1）以蓝色等高线显示，水平为\(3\sigma\)、\(6\sigma\)和\(12\sigma\)，其中\(\sigma\)是ALMA气体发射0阶矩图的均方根（RMS）噪声。我们还用虚线等高线显示负发射，水平为\(-3\sigma\)，并在每个面板的左下方显示相应的ALMA波束。背景中显示用于导出恒星面亮度的JWST滤光片，与表1中报告的相同。此处显示的ALMA等高线仅是未掩膜0阶矩图上的发射水平，因此它们不同于Rizzo等人（2023）中显示的伪X \(\sigma\)等高线。下行：RGB合成JWST图像。我们注意到上行和下行的尺度不同，下面板具有更大的视场，使我们能够看到ID3和ID13周围的前景和背景星系。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Priors for the parameters defining the 2D gas surface brightness models: intensity at the effective radius ( \(I_{{eff}}\) ), effective radius ( \(R_{{eff}}\) ), geometric centre ( \(x_{0}\) , \(y_{0}\) ), ellipticity ( \(\epsilon\) ) and position angle ( \(PA\) ). For the intensity, we arbitrarily chose 1.2 \(\sigma_{{RMS}}\) as the lower bound of the prior. \(\sigma_{{RMS}}\) is the RMS noise in the map.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：定义二维气体面亮度模型参数的先验：有效半径处的强度（\(I_{{eff}}\)）、有效半径（\(R_{{eff}}\)）、几何中心（\(x_{0}\)、\(y_{0}\)）、椭圆率（\(\epsilon\)）和位置角（\(PA\)）。对于强度，我们任意选择1.2 \(\sigma_{{RMS}}\)作为先验的下界。\(\sigma_{{RMS}}\)是图中的RMS噪声。

figures.caption_en: Table 3 : Rotation curve decomposition priors: fiducial model. The main three parameters we fit are the total gas mass, the total stellar mass and the dark matter mass. The total gas mass is computed by the product of the CO/[CI] luminosity (see Table 1 ) and the gas normalisation, i.e. the CO/[CI] line ratio ( \(r_{l}\) ) times the \(\alpha_{{CO}/{[CI]}}\) conversion. The truncation radius is assumed to be the extent of the gas data, that is the last radius in the CO/[CI] rotation curve. The total stellar mass is let free to vary and it is computed by the sum of the contribution of the disc and bulge masses assuming that the mass-to-light ratio of the bulge is 1.4 times that of the disc. The dark matter mass is computed from the baryonic fraction parameter that is let free to vary uniformly in log space.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：旋转曲线分解先验：基准模型。我们拟合的三个主要参数是总气体质量、总恒星质量和暗物质质量。总气体质量由CO/[CI]光度（见表1）与气体归一化因子（即CO/[CI]线比率\(r_{l}\)乘以\(\alpha_{{CO}/{[CI]}}\)转换因子）的乘积计算得出。截断半径假定为气体数据的范围，即CO/[CI]旋转曲线中的最后一个半径。总恒星质量自由变化，由盘和核球质量的贡献之和计算得出，假设核球的质量-光比是盘的1.4倍。暗物质质量由重子分数参数计算得出，该参数在对数空间中均匀自由变化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Surface brightness models of the gas (top panels) and stellar distribution (bottom panels) of ID1. Top left panel: the ALMA moment 0 map is overlayed with yellow contours for the data and orange for the best-fit model, following levels of 3 \(\sigma\) , 6 \(\sigma\) , 9 \(\sigma\) , etc., where \(\sigma\) is the RMS noise in the data. We also show negative contours with dashed gray lines at levels \(-3\sigma\) and \(-6\sigma\) . Top middle panel: noise-normalised residual map defined by (Data \(-\) Model) / RMS. Top right panel: 1D representation of the projected average surface brightness over inclined rings along the major axis of the galaxy. The yellow band represents the data and its uncertainties while the orange solid line represents the best-fit model. Bottom left panel: JWST image in grayscale is overlayed with teal contours for the data and blue for the best-fit model, following levels of 3 \(\sigma\) , 9 \(\sigma\) , 27 \(\sigma\) , etc. above the background, where \(\sigma\) is the RMS noise in the data. Bottom middle panel: noise-normalised residual map defined by (Data \(-\) Model) / RMS. Bottom left panel: 1D representation of the projected average surface brightness over inclined rings along the major axis of the galaxy. The teal band represents the data and the blue solid line represents the total best-fit model which is composed by a stellar disc (dotted dark blue line) and stellar bulge (dashed red line). In both top and bottom right panels we show the circularised ALMA beam/ JWST PSF and the data RMS as vertical dotted and horizontal dashed lines, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：ID1的气体（上面板）和恒星分布（下面板）的面亮度模型。左上方面板：ALMA 0阶矩图叠加了数据的黄色等高线和最佳拟合模型的橙色等高线，水平为3 \(\sigma\)、6 \(\sigma\)、9 \(\sigma\)等，其中\(\sigma\)是数据中的RMS噪声。我们还用灰色虚线显示负等高线，水平为\(-3\sigma\)和\(-6\sigma\)。上中方面板：噪声归一化残差图，定义为（数据\(-\)模型）/ RMS。右上方面板：沿星系长轴倾斜环上投影平均面亮度的一维表示。黄色带表示数据及其不确定性，橙色实线表示最佳拟合模型。左下方面板：灰度JWST图像叠加了数据的青色等高线和最佳拟合模型的蓝色等高线，水平为背景以上3 \(\sigma\)、9 \(\sigma\)、27 \(\sigma\)等，其中\(\sigma\)是数据中的RMS噪声。下中方面板：噪声归一化残差图，定义为（数据\(-\)模型）/ RMS。左下方面板：沿星系长轴倾斜环上投影平均面亮度的一维表示。青色带表示数据，蓝色实线表示总最佳拟合模型，该模型由恒星盘（深蓝色虚线）和恒星核球（红色虚线）组成。在右上和右下方面板中，我们分别用垂直虚线和水平虚线显示圆化后的ALMA波束/JWST PSF和数据RMS。

figures.caption_en: Table 4 : Best-fit parameters of the 2D surface brightness fits to the gas and stars. The gas discs were modelled using our DYNESTY based script and the stellar discs and bulges were modelled using GALFIT . For the latter, we employed a two-iteration fitting process in which the geometric parameters (indicated with an asterisk) were fixed in the second iteration to reduce the number of free parameters. Both the gas and stellar disc are exponential discs and the bulge is a de Vaucouleurs profile. \(R_{eff}\) for the exponential disc is calculated as \(1.678\times R_{d}\)
figures.caption_zh: 表4：气体和恒星二维面亮度拟合的最佳拟合参数。气体盘使用我们基于DYNESTY的脚本建模，恒星盘和核球使用GALFIT建模。对于后者，我们采用了两轮迭代拟合过程，其中几何参数（用星号表示）在第二轮迭代中被固定以减少自由参数的数量。气体盘和恒星盘都是指数盘，核球是德沃库勒轮廓。指数盘的\(R_{eff}\)计算为\(1.678\times R_{d}\)

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Surface brightness models of the gas (top panels) and stellar distribution (bottom panels) of ID3. The panel description is the same as Figure 2 . We note that there are foreground/background galaxies seen visible in the near-infrared (bottom left panel) that are fitted simultaneously to the target galaxy.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：ID3的气体（上面板）和恒星分布（下面板）的面亮度模型。面板描述与图2相同。我们注意到，在近红外（左下方面板）中可见的前景/背景星系与目标星系同时被拟合。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Surface brightness models of the gas (top panels) and stellar distribution (bottom panels) of ID13. The panel description is the same as Figure 2 and, similar to ID3, this galaxy is also surrounded by foreground/background galaxies that are fitted simultaneously.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：ID13的气体（上面板）和恒星分布（下面板）的面亮度模型。面板描述与图2相同，与ID3类似，该星系也被同时拟合的前景/背景星系所包围。

title: Identification of solid N2O in interstellar ices using open JWST data
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables, accepted to A&A Letters
summary:
Context. There are only six molecules containing N-O bond that are detected in gaseous phase in interstellar medium. One of those is nitrous oxide (N2O), which was searched for but not found in solid form from as early as Infrared Space Observatory (ISO) mission was launched. The observational capabilities of James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) present a possibility to identify solid interstellar N2O.
  Aims. We aim to identify nitrous oxide in open JWST spectra of interstellar ices towards a sample of Class 0, 0/I and flat protostars using the relevant laboratory mixtures of N2O-bearing interstellar ice analogues.
  Methods. A set of laboratory infrared transmission spectra was obtained for the following mixtures: N2O:CO2=1:20, N2O:CO=1:20, N2O:N2=1:20, N2O:CO2:CO=1:15:5, N2O:CO2:N2=1:15:13 at 10-23 K. A search for N2O in JWST NIRSpec spectra towards 50 protostars was performed by fitting the 4.44-4.47 um (2250-2235 cm-1) NN-stretch absorption band with new laboratory mixtures of N2O-bearing ices.
  Results. We claim the first secure identification of N2O in 16 protostars. The fitting results show that N2O is formed predominantly within the apolar layer of the ice mantles, rich in CO, CO2 and N2. The abundance of solid N2O is estimated as 0.2-2.1% relative to solid CO. We present band strengths for N2O in the mixtures corresponding to the apolar layer. Also, an identification of the C-N stretch band at 4.42 um (2260 cm-1) is reported, which we tentatively assign to HNCO, the simplest C-N bond carrier.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST观测数据，首次在16颗原恒星中确认了固态一氧化二氮(N2O)的存在，并估算了其在星际冰层中的丰度。
AI.motivation: 虽然已有6种含N-O键的分子在星际气相中被探测到，但一氧化二氮(N2O)在固态形式中尚未被发现。JWST的观测能力为识别固态星际N2O提供了可能。
AI.method: 获取了N2O与CO2、CO、N2等混合物的实验室红外透射光谱(10-23K)，然后在50颗原恒星的JWST NIRSpec光谱中，通过拟合4.44-4.47 μm的NN伸缩吸收带来搜索N2O。
AI.result: 首次在16颗原恒星中安全识别出N2O，发现N2O主要形成于富含CO、CO2和N2的冰层非极性层中。固态N2O相对于固态CO的丰度为0.2-2.1%。
AI.conclusion: 成功利用JWST观测数据首次确认了星际固态N2O的存在，揭示了其在星际冰层非极性层中的形成机制，并报告了可能属于HNCO的C-N伸缩带识别。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究星际冰中固态N2O的识别，属于星际介质化学领域，与用户主要兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、高红移星系运动学、高红移偏振、高红移多相气体）无直接关联。论文未涉及引力透镜、暗物质、星系结构或高红移星系等核心主题，也未包含用户核心作者。虽然使用了JWST数据，但仅作为观测工具，并非用户关注的透镜或高红移星系研究。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文主题为星际冰化学，与用户主要兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学等）不匹配。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。方法为实验室红外光谱拟合与JWST NIRSpec光谱分析，不涉及引力透镜建模、高红移星系运动学或偏振测量。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。作者列表中无用户核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 低。论文首次识别固态N2O，但属于星际介质化学的新发现，与用户研究领域的新颖性方向不同。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题与用户主要兴趣领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系）无关，且未涉及用户关注的高红移星系动力学、多相气体或偏振等方向。

artifacts.abstract_zh:
背景。在星际介质的气相中，仅检测到六种含有N-O键的分子。其中一种是氧化亚氮（N2O），自红外空间天文台（ISO）任务发射以来，人们就一直在寻找其固态形式，但未能发现。詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜（JWST）的观测能力为识别固态星际N2O提供了可能性。
目的。我们旨在利用相关的N2O星际冰模拟物实验室混合物，在公开的JWST星际冰光谱中，针对一组0类、0/I类和平坦型原恒星样本，识别氧化亚氮。
方法。在10-23 K温度下，获得了以下混合物的实验室红外透射光谱：N2O:CO2=1:20、N2O:CO=1:20、N2O:N2=1:20、N2O:CO2:CO=1:15:5、N2O:CO2:N2=1:15:13。通过将4.44-4.47微米（2250-2235 cm⁻¹）的N-N伸缩吸收带与新的N2O冰模拟物实验室混合物进行拟合，在50颗原恒星的JWST NIRSpec光谱中搜索N2O。
结果。我们首次确认在16颗原恒星中识别出N2O。拟合结果表明，N2O主要形成于富含CO、CO2和N2的冰幔非极性层内。固态N2O的丰度估计为固态CO的0.2-2.1%。我们给出了对应于非极性层的混合物中N2O的谱带强度。此外，还报告了在4.42微米（2260 cm⁻¹）处识别出的C-N伸缩带，我们初步将其归属为HNCO，即最简单的C-N键载体。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，成功利用JWST观测数据首次确认了星际固态N2O的存在，揭示了其在星际冰层非极性层中的形成机制，并报告了可能属于HNCO的C-N伸缩带识别。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : The \(\nu_{3}\) mode of N 2 O in pure N 2 O, N 2 O:H 2 O=1:20 and nitrous oxide in astrochemically relevant matrices corresponding to the apolar layer of ice mantles N 2 O:CO=1:20, N 2 O:N 2 =1:20, N 2 O:CO 2 :N 2 =1:15:13, N 2 O:CO 2 :CO=1:15:5, N 2 O:CO 2 =1:20. Spectra are displayed only for the lowest and the highest temperatures considered in this study.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：纯N2O、N2O:H2O=1:20以及氧化亚氮在对应于冰幔非极性层的天体化学相关基质中的\(\nu_{3}\)模式：N2O:CO=1:20、N2O:N2=1:20、N2O:CO2:N2=1:15:13、N2O:CO2:CO=1:15:5、N2O:CO2=1:20。仅显示本研究考虑的最低和最高温度下的光谱。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Raw and processed observational spectra with fitted polynomial continuum. Anchor points are represented with red dots, fitted continuum with red line. Original and processed observational spectra are shown with orange and black lines, respectively.

Black line represents the observational spectra, dashed — laboratory spectra of N 2 O in apolar environment, short dashed — HNCO Gaussian, green — combined N 2 O feature, and red — full fitted curve.

title: Particle Acceleration and Depolarization in the Protostellar jet knots HH 80 and HH 81
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, Accepted for publication in ApJ
summary: Linearly polarized emission is a powerful tracer of magnetic field geometry and particle acceleration in protostellar jets. We present a polarimetric study of the HH objects HH 80 and HH 81 from where non-thermal emission has been confirmed through spectral index measurements at low frequencies. We carried out observations of HH 80 and HH 81 with the Karl G. Jansky Very Large Array in 4-6 GHz. Unlike the inner jet knots, no linear polarization is detected towards the knots HH 80 and HH 81. We place a $3σ$ upper limit of $30~μ$Jy on the polarization intensity, corresponding to fractional polarization limits of $Π_{\max}\approx0.02$ and $0.01$ for HH 80 and HH 81, respectively. To interpret this non-detection, we assess the conditions for synchrotron polarization and the impact of depolarization mechanisms. The shock cooling parameter $χ_\mathrm{s}$ is lower in these outermost HH objects than in the inner knots, indicating that the reverse shocks in HH 80-81 are less efficient at accelerating relativistic electrons compared with the inner knots. Moreover, Faraday depolarization appears severe: the dispersion in the estimated rotation measure $σ_{\rm RM}\sim400~\mathrm{rad~m^{-2}}$ is comparable to or larger than observed RM values themselves. This is consistent with strong fluctuations and turbulence. Together with beam depolarization, these effects can suppress the observable fractional polarization flux densities below the detectable thresholds. We conclude that reduced acceleration efficiency (when compared to inner knots) and strong depolarization account for the absence of polarized emission towards HH 80 and HH 81.

AI.tldr: 对HH 80和HH 81原恒星喷流进行偏振观测，未检测到线性偏振，分析表明这是由于电子加速效率降低和强退偏振效应共同导致的。
AI.motivation: 线性偏振发射是研究原恒星喷流磁场几何结构和粒子加速的重要示踪剂。先前在低频光谱指数测量中已确认HH 80和HH 81存在非热辐射，因此希望通过偏振观测进一步了解这些区域的磁场特性和粒子加速机制。
AI.method: 使用Karl G. Jansky甚大阵列在4-6 GHz频段对HH 80和HH 81进行偏振观测。通过测量偏振强度上限，评估同步辐射偏振条件和退偏振机制的影响，包括分析激波冷却参数和法拉第退偏振效应。
AI.result: 未检测到HH 80和HH 81的线性偏振信号，偏振强度上限为30 μJy（3σ）。对应的最大分数偏振上限分别为Π_max≈0.02（HH 80）和0.01（HH 81）。激波冷却参数显示这些最外层HH天体的反向激波加速相对论电子的效率低于内部结。法拉第退偏振效应显著，旋转测量色散σ_RM~400 rad m^{-2}与观测到的RM值相当或更大，表明存在强波动和湍流。
AI.conclusion: HH 80和HH 81缺乏偏振发射是由于与内部结相比电子加速效率降低，以及强退偏振效应（包括法拉第退偏振和波束退偏振）共同作用的结果，这些效应将可观测的分数偏振通量密度抑制到检测阈值以下。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究原恒星喷流中的粒子加速和退偏振，属于恒星形成和射电偏振领域，与用户主要关注的强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、高红移星系运动学、高红移偏振及多相气体等主题无直接关联。论文未涉及引力透镜、高红移星系或用户核心作者，且主题偏向恒星物理，属于用户明确要求降权的领域。
recommendation.topic_fit: 论文主题为原恒星喷流偏振，与用户画像中的'magnetic'、'magnetic fields'、'polarization'等关键词有表面匹配，但用户的核心兴趣是强引力透镜和高红移星系，而非恒星形成喷流。该论文属于恒星物理，是用户要求降权的领域。
recommendation.method_fit: 论文使用VLA射电偏振观测和法拉第退偏振分析，与用户常用的强引力透镜建模、高红移星系动力学分析（如ALMA、JWST）等方法不匹配。
recommendation.author_fit: 论文作者均不在用户的核心作者列表中，无匹配。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 论文对HH 80/81的偏振非探测及退偏振机制分析具有一定新颖性，但属于恒星形成领域，与用户兴趣方向无关。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题为原恒星喷流偏振，属于恒星物理，是用户明确要求降权的领域；且未涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系等用户核心兴趣。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 线偏振发射是原恒星喷流中磁场几何结构和粒子加速的有力示踪物。我们对HH 80和HH 81这两个HH天体进行了偏振研究，通过低频段的谱指数测量已确认它们存在非热辐射。我们利用卡尔·G·詹斯基甚大阵列在4-6 GHz频段对HH 80和HH 81进行了观测。与内部喷流结不同，在HH 80和HH 81结处未探测到线偏振。我们将偏振强度的$3σ$上限设为$30~μ$Jy，对应的分数偏振上限分别为HH 80的$Π_{\max}\approx0.02$和HH 81的$Π_{\max}\approx0.01$。为解释这一未探测结果，我们评估了同步辐射偏振的条件以及退偏振机制的影响。这些最外侧HH天体的激波冷却参数$χ_\mathrm{s}$低于内部结，表明HH 80-81中的反向激波在加速相对论电子方面效率低于内部结。此外，法拉第退偏振似乎很严重：估计的旋转测量色散$σ_{\rm RM}\sim400~\mathrm{rad~m^{-2}}$与观测到的RM值相当或更大。这与强涨落和湍流一致。结合波束退偏振，这些效应可将可观测的分数偏振通量密度抑制到可探测阈值以下。我们得出结论：与内部结相比，加速效率降低以及强退偏振效应共同导致了HH 80和HH 81处偏振发射的缺失。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，HH 80和HH 81缺乏偏振发射是由于与内部结相比电子加速效率降低，以及强退偏振效应（包括法拉第退偏振和波束退偏振）共同作用的结果，这些效应将可观测的分数偏振通量密度抑制到检测阈值以下。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: (a) Linearly polarized emission observed toward the inner jet lobes of I18162. The white contours overlaid on the image are the Stokes I contours ( \((6,9,12,15,30,120),\sigma\) , where \(\sigma=10~\mu{Jy/beam}\) .), which are identical to the black contours in panel (b). (b) Total intensity radio map of the HH 80-81 region at the VLA C band, where the beam size is \(9^{\prime\prime}.5\times 6^{\prime\prime}.0\) . (c) Linearly polarized map towards HH 80 and HH 81, with Stokes I contours. The cyan ellipse at the bottom-left corner of the middle panel shows the beam size. The colour bar is shown on the top of the image.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：(a) 朝向I18162内部喷流叶观测到的线偏振发射。图像上叠加的白色等高线是Stokes I等高线 ( \((6,9,12,15,30,120),\sigma\) ，其中 \(\sigma=10~\mu{Jy/beam}\) )，与面板(b)中的黑色等高线相同。(b) VLA C波段HH 80-81区域的总强度射电图，波束大小为 \(9^{\prime\prime}.5\times 6^{\prime\prime}.0\) 。(c) 朝向HH 80和HH 81的线偏振图，叠加有Stokes I等高线。中间面板左下角的青色椭圆表示波束大小。色标显示在图像顶部。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: A plot of the shock velocity ( \(v_{s}\) ) as a function of the jet radius ( \(r_{jet}\) ), with \(\chi_{{s}}\) values shown using a colour scale for comparison between the inner knots and HH 80-81. The \(\chi_{{s}}\) values derived for each knot are indicated by grey points, and the corresponding colour bar is displayed on the right-hand side of the plot.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：激波速度 ( \(v_{s}\) ) 作为喷流半径 ( \(r_{jet}\) ) 的函数图，其中 \(\chi_{{s}}\) 值用色标表示，用于比较内部结与HH 80-81。每个结推导出的 \(\chi_{{s}}\) 值用灰色点表示，相应的色标显示在图的右侧。
